proposed_description: Feminine bases that turn masculine under the accrescitivo -one: la porta > il portone, la palla > il pallone, la stanza > lo stanzone. The diagnostic is the article/gender, distinct from producing the -one suffix itself.
rationale: Not strictly required to author (the three gender-shift items wf_aug_02/03 currently cite the parent leaf, so the batch is valid against the tree as shipped). Proposing it because the gender-shift miss (la portona) is diagnostically distinct from a plain augmentative miss and is dispatch hot spot #2: a sub-leaf would let those misses track separately. If ratified, retarget wf_aug_02 and wf_aug_03 and the translation item trans_wf_en_it_aug_01 from the parent leaf to this bucket.
